legal_model.notes_normalized: Cannabis is illegal in Hungary / Magyarország. Medical cannabis is illegal. Distribution is illegal. Prison exposure detected.

notes_normalized: Cannabis is illegal in Hungary / Magyarország. Medical cannabis is illegal. Distribution is illegal. Prison exposure detected.
notes_raw: {{main|Cannabis in Hungary}} There is no distinction in Hungarian law between illicit drugs according to dangers. [[Heroin]] use has the same legal consequences as cannabis use.<ref>{{citation |author = Minstrel |url = http://www.daath.hu/showText.php?id=62#chapter3 |title = Társaság a Szabadságjogokért: Drogjog 1999 Voted Vote D2ID : 62 |publisher = Daath.hu |access-date = 17 February 2011 |archive-date = 4 June 2019 |archive-url = https://web.archive.org/web/20190604073510/http://www.daath.hu/showText.php?id=62#chapter3 |url-status = live }}</ref>
